descriptions.short: Debug APIs like a human, not a robot. Finally, a REST client you'll love. For 64bit only.
descriptions.long: Powerful HTTP toolbelt, in one intuitive app Free and open source on Mac, Windows, and Linux Features Create HTTP requests. View entire transaction. Organize everything. Never repeat yourself. Love the experience. Insomnia Addons Enhance the power of the app. Plus Teams Pricing
